objects.query: SELECT BillingCity, BillingCountry, BillingPostalCode, BillingState, BillingStreet, CreatedDate, Id, Industry, Name, Phone, Website, ExternalID__c FROM Account
SELECT CreatedDate, Department, Email, FirstName, Id, LastName, MailingCity, MailingStreet, MobilePhone, Title, Account.ExternalID__c FROM Contact
SELECT Amount, CloseDate, CreatedDate, Description, Id, LeadSource, Name, Probability, StageName, Type, Difficulty__c, Account.ExternalID__c FROM Opportunity
